response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 19+ years of experience including 4+ recent years directly in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Current role at re:cinq as Staff Software Engineer explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work, directly matching a key requirement. Recent 3-year tenure at Optilyz demonstrates production expertise with the primary stack. Missing explicit mentions of Nest.js and testing frameworks are learnable gaps for a candidate of this caliber and experience level.
strengths: Current Staff role at re:cinq (April 2025–present) with direct AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and Node.js work—matches core job requirements
Recent full-stack production experience at Optilyz (2021–2025) with TypeScript, React, AWS CDK, and MongoDB across pricing and platform optimization
19+ years diverse software development background with multiple senior/staff positions spanning frontend, backend, cloud, and DevOps
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite being listed as primary stack technology
Testing framework expertise (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not detailed; testing methodology emphasis limited in resume
Authentication, authorization, and security best practices not discussed in employment narrative

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure role at re:cinq
Recent full-stack experience (TypeScript, React, AWS, MongoDB)
No explicit Nest.js or testing framework mentions
